title: KyronFall
description: KyronFall is a performance-optimized SMP & PvP modpack designed for smooth multiplayer gameplay.
body:
KyronFall brings together the best mods for PvP and SMP in one optimized, competitive-ready experience.

- This modpack is built for players who want:

- Fast and responsive combat

- Smooth multiplayer performance

- Balanced survival gameplay

- Clean, optimized mechanics

Whether you're fighting intense PvP battles or building empires in an SMP world, this pack delivers performance, stability, and power.

It includes:

⚔️ Great mods for better PvP combat

🌍 Smooth and stable multiplayer performance

🚀 FPS boosting and optimization mods

🛠️ Useful quality-of-life improvements
